backup_plan.description: Before P7 actual apply, a DB snapshot must be created: sqlite3 lottery_v2.db .dump > backups/p7_pre_apply_YYYYMMDD.sql

rollback_plan.description: All rows inserted in the P7 apply batch share rollback_batch_id. Rollback SQL: DELETE FROM strategy_prediction_replays WHERE controlled_apply_id IN (SELECT controlled_apply_id FROM p7_apply_log WHERE rollback_batch_id=?)
rollback_plan.idempotency_check: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM strategy_prediction_replays WHERE strategy_id=? AND target_draw=? AND lottery_type=?
